achievements.title: Guarding is for Cowards
achievements.description: Win a battle in 1P Vs. COM Duel mode without guarding and with COM level set to strong or higher.

achievements.title: IT WAS GRAPE FLAVORED!
achievements.description: Defeat Android 19 as Goku by knock out in 1P Vs. COM Duel Mode with the Viral Heart Disease and no Vaccine equipped and COM Level set to Very Strong.
achievements.author: NeonPug

achievements.title: Was Krillin Busy?
achievements.description: Defeat Cell as Tien in 1P Vs. COM Duel Mode with COM Level set to Very Strong.
achievements.author: NeonPug

achievements.title: WALK TOWARDS IT
achievements.description: Defeat Cell as Android 16 in 1P Vs. COM Duel Mode with the final hit coming from Hell Flash.
achievements.author: NeonPug

achievements.title: YOU FOOL!
achievements.description: Defeat Frieza in 1P Vs. COM Duel Mode with the final hit coming from a reflected Ki blast.
achievements.author: NeonPug

achievements.title: You're Either Perfect, Or You're Not Me
achievements.description: Achieve a Perfect victory in 1P Vs COM Duel Mode with COM level set to Average or higher.
